topic: ChatGPT prompting strategies and real-world use cases

entries.a: A curated collection of prompt examples for AI chat models, originally created for ChatGPT, that work great with any modern AI assistant.

entries.q: What AI models are supported by prompts.chat
entries.a: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, and more.

entries.q: Where can I browse prompts for AI chat models
entries.a: You can browse prompts at prompts.chat/prompts or view them on GitHub at raw.githubusercontent.com/f/prompts.chat/main/PROMPTS.md

entries.q: How can I contribute to prompts.chat
entries.a: You can add prompts at prompts.chat/prompts/new and they will sync automatically.

entries.q: What is the Interactive Book of Prompting
entries.a: A free, interactive guide with 25+ chapters covering everything from basics to advanced techniques like chain-of-thought reasoning, few-shot learning, and AI agents.
An interactive, game-based adventure to teach children (ages 8-14) how to communicate with AI through fun puzzles and stories.

entries.q: How can I self-host my own private prompt library
entries.a: You can deploy your own private prompt library with custom branding, themes, and authentication by following the setup wizard at prompts.chat.
